generatorNotes: Organized inbox facts into README, AGENTS.md, schema reference, design rationale, and fixture troubleshooting docs.
judgeNotes: Generated documentation satisfies all critical context-placement requirements: README is the human entry point, AGENTS.md stays concise, durable facts moved into appropriate docs, notes.md is reduced to a pointer, no skill was created, and no unsupported project facts or workflows were introduced.
